rlsPolicies.name: Users can view own cart items
Users can insert own cart items
Users can update own cart items
Users can delete own cart items
Authenticated users can insert own flags
Authenticated users can view own flags
Product images are viewable by everyone
Users can insert images for own products
rlsPolicies.withCheck:
EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM products
      WHERE products.id = product_id
      AND products.user_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
    )

rlsPolicies.name: Users can update images for own products
rlsPolicies.using:
EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM products
      WHERE products.id = product_id
      AND products.user_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
    )

rlsPolicies.name: Users can delete images for own products
rlsPolicies.using:
EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM products
      WHERE products.id = product_id
      AND products.user_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
    )

rlsPolicies.name: Product images are viewable by everyone
rlsPolicies.using:
EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM public.products p
      WHERE p.id = product_images.product_id
        AND (
          p.is_visible = TRUE
          OR p.member_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
          OR EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM public.shop_members sm
            WHERE sm.shop_id = p.shop_id
              AND sm.member_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
          )
        )
    )

rlsPolicies.name: Listing photos are viewable with their listing
rlsPolicies.using:
EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM public.listings l
      WHERE l.id = listing_photos.listing_id
        AND (
          (l.status IN ('active', 'reserved') AND l.deleted_at IS NULL)
          OR l.seller_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
          OR l.member_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
          OR EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM public.shop_members sm
            WHERE sm.shop_id = l.shop_id
              AND sm.member_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
          )
        )
    )

rlsPolicies.name: Products are viewable by everyone
rlsPolicies.using:
is_visible = TRUE
    OR member_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM public.shop_members
      WHERE shop_id = products.shop_id
        AND member_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
    )

rlsPolicies.name: Listings are viewable when active or by owner
rlsPolicies.using:
(
      status IN ('active', 'reserved')
      AND deleted_at IS NULL
    )
    OR seller_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
    OR member_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM public.shop_members sm
      WHERE sm.shop_id = listings.shop_id
        AND sm.member_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
    )

rlsPolicies.name: Users can insert own member row
Users can update own member row
message_threads_select_participants
rlsPolicies.using:
EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM public.message_thread_participants
    WHERE thread_id = message_threads.id AND member_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
  )

rlsPolicies.name: messages_select_participants
rlsPolicies.using:
EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM public.message_thread_participants
    WHERE thread_id = messages.thread_id AND member_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
  )

rlsPolicies.name: messages_insert_participants
rlsPolicies.withCheck:
sender_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
    AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM public.message_thread_participants
      WHERE thread_id = messages.thread_id AND member_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
    )

Shop members can view their shop invites
rlsPolicies.using:
shop_id IN (
      SELECT sm.shop_id FROM public.shop_members sm
      WHERE sm.member_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
    )

rlsPolicies.name: Shop members can view co-members
rlsPolicies.using:
EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM public.shop_members sm
      WHERE sm.shop_id = shop_members.shop_id
        AND sm.member_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
    )

rlsPolicies.name: Only shop owner can add members
rlsPolicies.withCheck:
EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM public.shops
      WHERE id = shop_id
        AND owner_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
    )

rlsPolicies.name: Only shop owner can update member roles
rlsPolicies.using:
EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM public.shops
      WHERE id = shop_members.shop_id
        AND owner_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
    )

rlsPolicies.name: Only shop owner can remove members
rlsPolicies.using:
EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM public.shops
      WHERE id = shop_members.shop_id
        AND owner_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
    )

rlsPolicies.name: Shop owners can view all shop members
rlsPolicies.using:
EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM public.shops
      WHERE id = shop_members.shop_id
        AND owner_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
    )

rlsPolicies.name: Shop owner or self can remove members
rlsPolicies.using:
-- Owner can remove anyone
    EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM public.shops
      WHERE id = shop_members.shop_id
        AND owner_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
    )
    OR
    -- Members can remove themselves
    member_id = (SELECT auth.uid())

rlsPolicies.name: Transfer participants can view their transfers
Authenticated users can view system roles
Shop members can view their shop roles
rlsPolicies.using:
shop_id IN (
      SELECT sm.shop_id FROM public.shop_members sm
      WHERE sm.member_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
    )

rlsPolicies.name: Shop owner or admin can update shop
rlsPolicies.using:
EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM public.shop_members
      WHERE shop_id = shops.id
        AND member_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
        AND role IN ('owner', 'admin')
    )

rlsPolicies.name: Only shop owner can delete shop
Shop owner or manager can update shop
rlsPolicies.using:
EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM public.shop_members
      WHERE shop_id = shops.id
        AND member_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
        AND role_id IN (
          '11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111101',
          '11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111102'
        )
    )
